text: Sir jhuka kar Sorry Sir bol diya, aur bas chup rehna pada.

text: Aise pal mein jam jana natural hai. Tumne relation bachane ke liye khud ko peeche kar diya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: naukri risk mein nahi daal sakti
text: Mujhe naukri risk mein nahi daal sakti, isliye kuch bol bhi nahi paayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk soothe karke Lens D se sustained helpless pressure mirror karna.
text: Kaafi time se tum yahi pattern jhel rahi ho - sehna, chup rehna, aur relation sambhalna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Agar palat kar bolti toh parvarish par sawal ho jata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared social consequence softly mirror karna.
text: Tumhe lagta hai ek jawab se sirf office nahi, ghar-sasural ki image bhi toot sakti hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sasural mein izzat kam ho jati
text: Sasural mein meri izzat kam ho jati, isliye main chup rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue par short restatement dena, Lens C se relational stakes hold karna.
text: Izzat bachane ke chakkar mein tumhe apni awaaz rokni padi...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: papa ki fasal destroy ho gayi
text: Papa kisan hain, fasal destroy ho gayi, EMI bhi atki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke words se single grounded question puchna.
text: Jab fasal aur EMI ka thought aata hai, sabse heavy kis rishtay ki zimmedari lagti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Papa ko naraz nahi kar sakti, aur Boss ko bhi upset nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se two-side relational pull mirror karna.
text: Jaise tum beech mein phasi ho - ek taraf ghar, doosri taraf office authority.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isi mein andar se daba hua feel karti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relational Preservation conflict ke baad helpless-trapped feeling reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum khud ko phasa hua aur बेबस feel kar rahi ho, jahan kisi ko na naraaz karna hi rule ban gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, isliye apni baat daba deti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Emotion validate karke C4 + family-izzat reality se jodna.
text: Jab naukri, EMI aur parivaar ki izzat saath judi ho, aisa shame aur helplessness feel karna bilkul samajh aata hai. Tumhari keemat is chup rehne ya na rehne se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka laga, par kal fir meeting ka darr hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic anecdote se relational silence pattern normalize karna.
text: Working bahu roles mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki sabko rishton ki maryada pehle rakhni padti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon taaki kal toot na jaun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ke baad 3 low-burden options dena.
text: Teen quick options: 4-min breathing, meeting se pehle first line note, aur EMI reminder lock.

speaker: Seeker
text: Second aur third karungi, first line note kar leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen step ko simple sequence mein execute karwana.
text: Pehle notes kholo, meeting ki first line likho, start-time alarm lagao, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, control aaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Structural reframe se self-blame reduce karna.
text: Jab kaam aur rishton ki maryada overlap ho, freeze-response structural hota hai, personal kami nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab utna heavy feel nahi ho raha.

text: Tumne pressure ke beech structure nikala, yeh strong practical step hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh karungi. Main theek hona chahti hoon.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

text: Strong shift hai, tumne load ke beech apni rhythm pakdi.

speaker: Supporter

text: Practical choice hai, tum pressure ko manageable bana rahi ho.

strategy_intent: Emotion validate karke C4 + izzat context se connect karna.
text: Jab office humiliation, bank pressure aur ghar ki izzat saath ho, aisa panic feel karna bilkul samajh aata hai. Tumhari keemat sirf is sehne se define nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka laga, par kal ka thought phir heartbeat badha deta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic anecdote se relational silence pattern normalize karna.
text: Working bahu roles mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki sabko khandaan ki izzat pehle rakhni padti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon taaki kal toot na jaun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ke baad 3 low-burden options dena.
text: Teen options: 4-min breathing, meeting se pehle first line note, aur bank-call reminder plan lock.

speaker: Seeker
text: Second aur third karungi, first line note kar leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen step ko simple sequence mein execute karwana.
text: Pehle notes kholo, first line likho, start-time alarm lagao, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, control aaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Structural reframe dekar self-blame reduce karna.
text: Power imbalance aur izzat-pressure overlap mein freeze response structural hota hai, personal fault nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab utna heavy feel nahi ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress reinforce karna.
text: Tumne panic ke beech structure nikala, yeh strong practical step hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Meeting thought aate hi trigger hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Trigger ke liye 3 concise resets dena.
text: 3 slow exhales, 10-min prep chunk, pehla easy point bolna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh karungi. Main theek hona chahti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second structural reframe dena.
text: Relational-pressure phase mein micro-steps best kaam karte hain kyunki mind ko safe next action milta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab stable lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stability acknowledge karna.
text: Strong shift hai, tumne load ke beech apni rhythm pakdi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal same scene ho toh us moment koi raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: In-the-moment 3 quick options dena.
text: 30-sec pause, next 10-min task pick, completion pe tick mark. Bas.

speaker: Seeker
text: 10-min reset useful hai, follow karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen approach reinforce karna.
text: Practical choice hai, tum pressure ko manageable bana rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks, ab lag raha kal nikal jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night close ke tiny anchors dena.
text: Aaj raat paani, 5-min breathing, aur kal ka first-line note visible. Bas itna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, ab settled feel ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close mein progress reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tum panic-helplessness loop se structured flow tak aaye ho, yeh strong shift hai. Ek phase tumhari value define nahi karta, kal ke anchors ready hain.
